title: 朝のバクシン・熱血指導っス！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, it's time to Bakushin, Bakushiiin! There
are only five minutes until the bell!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hurry up! Once it's time, we're shutting those
gates!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...All right, I think that should be the last of them!
Even City's turned up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait just a second! I spot a hazy shadow in the
distance, slowly wobbling towards us!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I'm sooo sleepy. I really can't do mornings...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's Jordan! Whoa, she's wobbling all over
the place!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Jordan, make a run for it! You've got to
BAKUSHIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I can't... You can shut the gates now. I'll find
another way in...

Locking onto target! Firing Gold Gold Missiles in
three, two... one!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, who kicked me just now?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You kidding? Who else could it be?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I mean, would you have preferred someone else?
What if you turned around only to find some
creepy old man?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, you have a point there—what am I saying?!
Hey, Class Rep, are you really gonna let that
slide?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Violence is inexcusable, that I can agree with! It's
certainly not something to let slide!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However! What I just witnessed was an act of
friendship—wonderful, beautiful friendship!
Thanks to her excellent problem solving, you
made it just in time for the bell!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So I believe her act was justified!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That was a brilliant move if you ask me! But you
better not go around injuring anyone!
